notes: Ground truth: /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/docs/ui-map-02*.csv (trading panel rows), /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/knowledge/playbooks/deepchart_platform/trading/trading_execution.yaml, risk_manager.yaml, sim_and_trade_copier.yaml. Verified trading-panel facts you may state: order grid MKT/BID/ASK/LMT/STP/STP LMT per side; BID/ASK place limit at best bid/ask offset by 'Ticks diff.'; Breakeven moves stop to entry +/- Breakeven-Ticks (Settings > Trading); Cancel = cancel pending orders, Flat = close position, Cancel and Flat = both - all scoped to the panel's symbol; OCO block SL/TP in ticks or money with BE/Trail; Server vs Client OCO (bracket lives serverside vs in-app; Rithmic + Trade Copier requires CLIENT); MULTI strategies via gear editor; red (!) means strategy qty != panel Qty (blocks execution); Link pending orders pairs an existing SL+TP into an OCO. dom-trading-chart: bottom-bar DOM Trading radio; green column click = BUY (LMT/STP auto by level), red = SELL, D: label = position P/L, CANCEL ALL / FLAT ALL; requires Trading Enabled. Check /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/docs/ui-maps-owner-answers-needed.csv for unanswered rows (e.g. ALL-button scope) and hedge those. For LIVE rewrites fetch the live article too and keep its correct facts.
